chapter_title: 真人感窗口人像 RealPantyhose 测试 V3

panels.scene_description: near-real full-body portrait of an East Asian woman squatting by a bright window in a red dress, sheer black pantyhose, and red heels

resolved_prompt.positive: beautiful East Asian woman, long brown-black hair, delicate facial proportions, brown eyes, natural lips, realistic eyelashes, large bright window, grey curtain, soft daylight, wooden floor, indoor natural light, airy apartment interior, full-body composition, squatting pose, looking back toward camera, clearly wearing a fitted long-sleeve red dress made of visible red fabric, dress fully covering torso, waist and hips, subtle black color RealPantyhose, semi-sheer black pantyhose continuing over hips, thighs, knees and calves, clearly visible red ankle-strap high heels with red shoe body and red heel, soft smile, realistic skin, realistic knees and hands, bright window rim light, grey curtains, clean wood floor, shallow depth of field, natural feminine pose, very close to real photo, clothed fashion portrait, no fabric draped around body, elegant fashion photo finish, photorealistic, realistic skin texture, realistic skin pores, cinematic daylight, soft backlight, realistic depth of field, premium texture detail, realistic photography look
resolved_prompt.negative: cartoon, 2d, painting, illustration, overprocessed beauty skin, plastic skin, low quality, worst quality, blurry, deformed anatomy, extra fingers, text, watermark, office props, smartphone, empty limbs, duplicate body parts, broken hands, anime face, heavy cel shading, exaggerated giant eyes, posterized skin, oversharpened edges, white cloth, cream cloth, beige cloth, blanket, towel, shawl, wrap dress made from loose fabric, nude shoulder wrap, exposed shoulders, off-shoulder cream garment, white dress, ivory dress, bathrobe, thighhighs, thigh-highs, stockings, stocking tops, garter belt, exposed upper thigh, visible thigh band, black shoes, black pumps, dark heels, fully black footwear

resolved_render.notes: Photoreal hosiery benchmark v3: stay on the better-behaved RealPantyhose line, but reduce strength one more step to see whether the dress structure recovers further without giving up all hosiery guidance.

narration: 这一版继续用 RealPantyhose，但再把强度收一档，测试红裙结构能不能更稳。
